description: Permanent pipeline configuration — Digital Product PDF Engine + AI Product Critic
anti_hallucination_guardrail: At the start of every session, read this file. If any instruction contradicts this config, flag the conflict and ask for confirmation before proceeding.

regex_rules.bold_strip_description: STRICTLY preserve inner content when removing **bold** markers. The captured group (.+?) MUST be preserved. NEVER replace bold content with anything other than the captured text itself.
regex_rules.bold_strip_wrong: re.sub(r'\*\*(.+?)\*\*', r'|', text)  ← WRONG — pipe char deletes inner content
regex_rules.bold_strip_correct: re.sub(r'\*\*(.+?)\*\*', r'\1', text)  ← CORRECT — preserves inner text

pipeline_stages.name: Preprocess
pipeline_stages.description: Strip artifacts, normalize bold markers, sanitize HTML

pipeline_stages.name: AI-Agentic Checklist Synthesis
pipeline_stages.description: Generate 12-item AI-synthesized checklists from source markdown

pipeline_stages.name: WeasyPrint PDF Generation
pipeline_stages.description: Generate main guide PDFs with CSS injection

pipeline_stages.name: AI Product Critic Audit
pipeline_stages.description: Audit all products across 3 dimensions: Comprehensiveness / Visual Polish / Value Check

pipeline_stages.name: QA Gate
pipeline_stages.description: Layout QA — exit 0 required to proceed

pipeline_stages.name: GitHub Sync
pipeline_stages.description: Sync all PDFs to mrohitth/products-distribution final_products/

products.title: New Cat First Weeks Survival Guide
